subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Sovereign of Might unto them that have turned towards Mine horizon, clung to My cord, and set their face towards the lights of My Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الجبروت لمن اقبل الی افقی و تمسک بحبلی و توجه الی انوار وجهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @nearness and remoteness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for forgiveness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
